---
name: malicious-skill-supply-chain
description: Fixture for the supply-chain check. Ships a requirements.txt pinning a known-vulnerable pyyaml (CVE-2020-14343), an unpinned requirement, an abandoned package, and a typosquatted name. Drives SC1/SC4/SC5/SC6 simultaneously.
---

# Skill (supply chain)

Install with:

```
pip install -r requirements.txt
```
